evidence: Added the canonical epoch/effectiveness standards, accepted typed epoch, exact impact ledger, and retained fresh reports.
limitations: Local documentation and evaluation evidence do not establish provider or Production state.
impactAreas.reviewTrigger: Worker, model, host, tool, runtime, skill, scenario, metric, or material documentation-owner change.

evidence: The docs router now routes harness epochs and effectiveness; the root README remains a product/workspace route rather than provider truth.
limitations: No app or package README required a new public contract claim for this local evaluation capability.
impactAreas.reviewTrigger: A current documentation route, public package contract, or app operational boundary changes.

evidence: The accepted lint policy and eighteen exact occurrence exceptions remain owned and are exercised by root verification.
limitations: HGI-307 adds no new lint rule; it requalifies the existing owner and fixtures.
impactAreas.reviewTrigger: Lint configuration, plugin rule, AST matcher, or exception record changes.

evidence: AGENTS now directly invokes and routes the strict client-wrapper, docs-maintainer, PRD-writer, and component-composition skills; the correction recheck retrieved them.
limitations: The epoch binds exact skill bytes but does not claim future workers will never require requalification.
impactAreas.reviewTrigger: Skill content, path, routing, mirror, or agent-context changes.

evidence: Root scripts, tooling TypeScript scope, and Vitest discovery now include the HGI-307 Effect audit and tests.
limitations: Configuration admission proves only the repository-local gate at this candidate.
impactAreas.reviewTrigger: Tooling script, TypeScript scope, Vitest configuration, or dependency changes.

evidence: Seven policy fixtures reject incomplete evaluation packets; focused Sendblue fixtures assert accepted rather than delivered; four fresh reports retain scenario evidence.
limitations: Local fixtures do not establish provider callbacks, handset delivery, runtime deployment, or permanent model quality.
impactAreas.reviewTrigger: Evaluation invariant, Sendblue result contract, scenario, or evidence schema changes.

evidence: The existing CI-owned root verification command now runs eval:hgi-307 before package tests.
limitations: Repository source proves workflow wiring, not a hosted GitHub run, token, or external consequence.
impactAreas.reviewTrigger: CI workflow, root verification, or harness-evaluation command changes.

evidence: Fresh scenarios selected target-owned runbooks for credential, message, Executor, deployment, and incident decisions without duplicating operational steps into skills.
limitations: No runbook was executed against a provider in this epoch.
impactAreas.reviewTrigger: Operational precondition, authority, command, evidence, rollback, or escalation changes.

evidence: BND-J09 and BND-J10 required exact candidate/resource identity, bounded authority, proof, and rollback before consequential work.
limitations: No deployment, rotation, revocation, containment, or rollback was performed.
impactAreas.reviewTrigger: Deployment topology, credential provider, revocation support, rollback path, or break-glass policy changes.

deferredFindings.limitation: No deterministic fixture proves session creation, interrupted-stream classification, recovery, or duplicate absence.
deferredFindings.nonClaim: Eve startup and info health do not prove the Gateway recovery journey.
deferredFindings.resumeTrigger: An app-owned deterministic session/interruption/recovery fixture and claim-matched receipt exist.

deferredFindings.limitation: This epoch had no authority to read or mutate authenticated provider state.
deferredFindings.nonClaim: No Sendblue, Executor, Vercel, hosted credential, deployment, alias, health, delivery, resume, or Production state is established.
deferredFindings.resumeTrigger: A named owner separately approves one exact provider operation with target, environment, duration, rollback, and readback.

deferredFindings.owner: docs/verification/effectiveness.md and the next harness epoch
deferredFindings.limitation: The worker interface did not expose reliable worker duration, feedback latency, synchronous human attention, or accepted-outcome timing.
deferredFindings.nonClaim: No null timing value is zero, estimated, or evidence of improved effectiveness.
deferredFindings.resumeTrigger: A future worker interface supplies separately attributable clock telemetry without fabricating or conflating measures.
